description: Fundamentals of programming using Python. Topics include variables, control flow, functions, data structures, and basic algorithms.
Study of fundamental data structures (arrays, linked lists, trees, graphs) and algorithm design techniques (sorting, searching, dynamic programming).
Principles of OOP including encapsulation, inheritance, polymorphism, and design patterns using Java and C++.
Relational database design, SQL, normalization, indexing, transactions, and introduction to NoSQL databases.
Software development lifecycle, agile methodologies, requirements engineering, testing strategies, and project management.
